Title: Choose Your Body Plan
Description:
The mod's current version is v0.0.2

Mod's manifest ID was changed in the most recent update. Old saves will get a superficial complaint about a missing mod, but what the mod does all happens during world-gen, before the opportunity to save.

Build Codes might be broken between versions.

[h2]Choose Your Body Plan[/h2]

Adds a module to character creation allowing mutants to pick an alternative body plan.

Includes options (in the options menu) to enable body plan selection for True Kin.

Also includes options to expand the available body plans to that of robots (makes you mechanical by default), as well as those avaialble in-game if you [REDACTED] a [REDACTED].

[h3]Features:[/h3]
[list]
    [*]Choose your body plan right in character creation, from almost all of the anatomies available from the game's files.
    [*]Modded anatomies automatically added to the list, with the ability for modders to customize how they appear or if they appear at all (see the mod folder's MODDING.md).
    [*]Rich information about each of the body plans you'll have access to, including what libs you'll get, what natural equipment they come with, as well as whether or not a given limb is compatible with cybernetics for those otherwise genetically predisposed.
    [*]Saves the selected body plan into the build code, so you can retreive your selection when choosing the "Last" option, or by saving a code to your library.
[/list]

Compatible with main and beta.

Somehow, Harmony free!

Named in homage to [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3032410975]Choose Your Fighter[/url] (which you should definitely check out in combination with this mod), with the blessing of its author.

Thank you to the kind folks of the modding discord, whose shoulders I, and this mod, stand atop.

If you'd like assistance in setting up your modded anatomy to play nice with this mod, there's [url=https://github.com/UnderDoug/UD_BodyPlan_Selection/blob/main/Mod/MODDING.md]a guide[/url], or you can ping me @underdoug on the Caves of Qud discord where I spend too much time.

Want to see how it's made? There's a [url=https://github.com/UnderDoug/UD_BodyPlan_Selection]git repository[/url]!
